HOME.MAIN_SLOGAN: Redefining Urban Style with Vanguard and Elegance.
HOME.WHO_DESC: InduLex transcends the conventional in urban and sports apparel. We fuse textile engineering with bold design to offer garments that define an era.
HOME.SLOGANS: Innovation, Comfort and Attitude in Every Piece.
HOME.SLOGANS_DESC: Elevating textile industry standards with constant innovation.
HOME.CARROUSEL_DESC: Discover the perfect fusion between textile technology and vanguard urban design.
HOME.EVENTS_EVENT1_LONG_DESC: Get ready for our biggest sale of the year. Up to 50% off on all winter collections, including limited edition hoodies and technical jackets. Join us online and in-store starting July 15th.
HOME.EVENTS_EVENT2_LONG_DESC: Experience the vibe at our exclusive Pop-up Store in Palermo Soho. Enjoy a live set by DJ 'Vanguard', exclusive preview of the 'Neon Urban' drop, and a 20% flat discount for attendees.
HOME.EVENTS_EVENT3_LONG_DESC: Unlock the ultimate InduLex experience. VIP members get 48-hour early access to all new collections, free worldwide shipping with no minimum spend, and invitations to private styling sessions.

SUPPORT.TITLE: Technical Support
SUPPORT.BOT_WELCOME: Hi, I'm your InduLex assistant. Which topic would you like to receive technical information about?

DIALOGUES.ORDERS: To track your order, access 'My Orders' in your profile. We process shipments in less than 24 business hours after confirming the purchase.
DIALOGUES.PAYMENTS: We operate with 256-bit SSL encryption. You can pay with any bank card or Mercado Pago balance with no extra charges.
DIALOGUES.PRODUCTS: Our Tech-Fiber fabrics require cold wash and shade drying to maintain elasticity and original color for years.
DIALOGUES.SHIPPING: Priority shipping arrives in 48 hours to CABA and GBA. For the rest of the country, the timeframe is 3 to 5 days via premium logistics.
DIALOGUES.OTHER: If your doubt is specific, our human team is available Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM to provide personalized attention.
